page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n2.7xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 CPU architecture configured with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, resulting in a strict one-thread-per-core topology without hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring the attachment of external block storage volumes for operating system and application data. It also lacks integrated GPU hardware accelerators and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, offering predictable processing capabilities at the expense of the resource density advantages found in shared-core or burstable configurations.

Given the balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU cores, the ecs.n2.7xlarge is designed for workloads requiring consistent compute and memory performance. Suitable use cases include enterprise application servers, web serving, mid-sized databases, and general-purpose business applications that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n2.7xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core to deliver predictable, non-shared compute performance. The instance is provisioned with 128.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. Tradeoffs include the complete absence of local storage, requiring external block storage solutions, and the lack of integrated GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This resource profile makes the instance suitable for enterprise web serving, application hosting, and mid-sized database workloads that demand dedicated processing resources without the need for high-speed local storage or hardware acceleration.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute instance featuring thirty-two physical cores and balanced memory allocation for predictable general-purpose workloads.
